basic_details.job_title: HLL – HR Officer, Lab Technician and More
basic_details.organization_name: Mini Ratna Central Public Sector Enterprise under Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Govt. of India
basic_details.application_mode: Walk-in Interview (FTC posts) / Online CV submission (Consultant posts)
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare (HLL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of HR Officer, Lab Technician and More Posts. Candidates with M.Com, M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, MCA, DMLT, MLT Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 05-05-2026, and ends on 12-06-2026. For detailed information please visit HLL official website, lifecarehll.com.

age_limit.age_details: Written Test - MCQ Based, 50 Marks, 30 Minutes, No Negative Marking (only for candidates qualifying Skill Test)

qualification.education_qualification: M.Com, M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, MCA, DMLT, MLT

selection_process: Skill Test + Written Test (MCQ, 50 Marks, 30 Minutes, No Negative Marking)
how_to_apply: Candidates for FTC positions must Walk-in for the interview at the respective location on the scheduled date between 09:00 AM and 01:00 PM. No prior registration is required for Walk-in. Candidates must carry all original certificates along with one set of self-attested copies at the time of interview. Failure to produce original documents will disqualify the candidate from appearing for the selection test.
seo_tags: HLL Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for HR Officer, Lab Technician and More Posts
